phrases.intent_en: Ask for a walking map of the historic centre
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner un plan de promenade dans le centre historique ?
phrases.pronunciation: poor-YAY-voo muh doh-NAY uhn PLAHN duh prohm-NAHD dahn luh SAHNT-ruh ees-toh-REEK
phrases.cultural_note: Rouen's historic centre is one of France's best-preserved medieval cities, with over 2000 half-timbered buildings. The tourist office on the Place de la Cathédrale offers free walking tour maps in multiple languages.

responses.english: Hello, the map is free at reception.
responses.phonetic: BON-zhoor poor-YAY voo muh DON ayn / un PLAN duh prom-NAD dan luh SAHN-truh ee-sto-REEK
responses.french: Bonjour, le plan est gratuit à l'accueil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the area's history in World War II
phrases.text_local: Quels quartiers de Rouen ont été bombardés pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel kar-TYAY duh roo-AHN ohn ay-TAY bohm-bar-DAY pahn-DAHN lah suh-GOHND gair mohnd-YAL
phrases.cultural_note: Rouen was heavily bombed in 1944 during the Allied liberation of Normandy. The riverfront and Rive Gauche were largely destroyed while the cathedral area and medieval centre survived. Many half-timbered facades are post-war faithful reconstructions.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best street for half-timbered houses
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la rue la plus pittoresque pour voir les maisons à colombages ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah ROO lah ploo pee-toh-RESK poor vwahr lay may-ZOHN ah koh-lohn-BAHJ
phrases.cultural_note: The Rue Martainville and Rue Damiette are considered the most atmospheric streets for half-timbered architecture. The Rue des Boucheries-Saint-Ouen is another excellent example of medieval streetscape.

responses.english: I recommend Rue des Marchands, that's where the most beautiful half-timbered houses are, five minutes from here.
responses.phonetic: KEL es la ROO la PLOO pee-toh-RESK poor VWAHR lay may-ZONZ ah koh-lohm-BAZH
responses.french: Je vous recommande la rue des Marchands, c'est là qu'il y a les plus beaux colombages, à cinq minutes d'ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme de Rouen ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh too-REEZ-muh duh roo-AHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Rouen tourist office is located on the Place de la Cathédrale, directly opposite the cathedral facade. It offers maps, guided tour bookings, and a city pass that covers most major museums.

responses.english: It is right opposite the train station, fifty meters on your right.
responses.phonetic: BON-zhoor, OO suh TROOV loh-FEES duh TOO-rizm?
responses.french: Il est juste en face de la gare, à cinquante mètres sur votre droite.
